title: SCRAP CIRCUIT: BOSS RUN
attractText:
BUTTON 1: START / PLACE BAIT NODE  •  STICK: MOVE  •  BUTTON 2: PULSE DASH
Lure scrap beasts through your gadgets, overload cores, survive 3 boss hunts.
html: <!DOCTYPE html><html><head><meta charset="utf-8"><meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1"><style>html,body{margin:0;background:#0d1014;color:#e8f0ff;font-family:system-ui,sans-serif;height:100%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center}canvas{width:min(96vmin,960px);height:min(96vmin,960px);image-rendering:pixelated;background:#11161c;box-shadow:0 0 0 6px #1e2630,0 0 40px rgba(0,0,0,.5)}</style></head><body><canvas id="game" width="960" height="960"></canvas><script>const c=document.getElementById('game'),x=c.getContext('2d');const W=960,H=960,CX=480,CY=480;let audioCtx=null;function audio(){if(!audioCtx){try{audioCtx=new (window.AudioContext||window.webkitAudioContext)()}catch(e){}}if(audioCtx&&audioCtx.state==='suspended')audioCtx.resume();}function beep(f=440,d=.08,t='square',v=.03,s=0){if(!audioCtx)return;const o=audioCtx.createOscillator(),g=audioCtx.createGain();o.type=t;o.frequency.setValueAtTime(f,audioCtx.currentTime+s);g.gain.setValueAtTime(.0001,audioCtx.currentTime+s);g.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(v,audioCtx.currentTime+s+.01);g.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(.0001,audioCtx.currentTime+s+d);o.connect(g);g.connect(audioCtx.destination);o.start(audioCtx.currentTime+s);o.stop(audioCtx.currentTime+s+d+.02)}const input=()=>window.arcadeInput||{};const clamp=(v,a,b)=>Math.max(a,Math.min(b,v));const dist=(a,b)=>Math.hypot(a.x-b.x,a.y-b.y);const rand=(a,b)=>a+Math.random()*(b-a);const irand=(a,b)=>Math.floor(rand(a,b+1));let state='title',t=0,last=0,msgTimer=0;let player,nodes,enemies,bullets,parts,sparks,bossIndex=0,lives=3,score=0,stageTimer=0,bossName='';const walls=[{x:170,y:170,w:120,h:120},{x:670,y:170,w:120,h:120},{x:170,y:670,w:120,h:120},{x:670,y:670,w:120,h:120},{x:405,y:130,w:150,h:90},{x:405,y:740,w:150,h:90},{x:130,y:405,w:90,h:150},{x:740,y:405,w:90,h:150},{x:345,y:345,w:270,h:270}];function resetPlayer(){player={x:120,y:120,r:16,speed:3.2,dash:0,dashCd:0,hp:5,inv:0,carry:0}}function makeNode(x,y){return{x,y,r:20,armed:false,life:900,cool:0}}function spawnStage(i){nodes=[];enemies=[];bullets=[];parts=[];sparks=[];stageTimer=0;resetPlayer();for(let k=0;k<8+i*2;k++){let px,py,ok=false;while(!ok){px=rand(120,840);py=rand(120,840);ok=!walls.some(w=>px>w.x-40&&px<w.x+w.w+40&&py>w.y-40&&py<w.y+w.h+40)&&Math.hypot(px-player.x,py-player.y)>180}parts.push({x:px,y:py,r:10,spin:rand(0,6.28)})}if(i===0){bossName='MAGNET MAW';enemies.push({type:'maw',x:820,y:820,r:34,v:1.7,hp:18,max:18,phase:0,cool:80})}if(i===1){bossName='SAW PRIEST';enemies.push({type:'priest',x:820,y:140,r:30,v:2.1,hp:22,max:22,phase:0,cool:90,angle:0})}if(i===2){bossName='TRASH TITAN';enemies.push({type:'titan',x:820,y:820,r:42,v:1.4,hp:28,max:28,phase:0,cool:100,armor:0})}}function startGame(){audio();state='play';bossIndex=0;lives=3;score=0;spawnStage(0);beep(320,.12,'sawtooth',.05);beep(520,.1,'square',.03,.04)}function hitPlayer(d=1){if(player.inv>0)return;player.hp-=d;player.inv=70;beep(140,.18,'sawtooth',.06);for(let i=0;i<12;i++)sparks.push({x:player.x,y:player.y,vx:rand(-4,4),vy:rand(-4,4),life:25,col:'#ff6b6b'});if(player.hp<=0){lives--;if(lives>0){msgTimer=100;resetPlayer()}else{state='gameover';t=0;beep(90,.5,'sawtooth',.08)}}}function explodeBoss(b){for(let i=0;i<40;i++)sparks.push({x:b.x,y:b.y,vx:rand(-6,6),vy:rand(-6,6),life:45,col:i%2?'#ffd166':'#8ce99a'});beep(120,.2,'square',.06);beep(220,.35,'sawtooth',.06,.08);score+=1000*(bossIndex+1);bossIndex++;if(bossIndex>=3){state='victory';t=0}else{state='stageclear';t=0}}function placeNode(){if(player.carry<=0||nodes.length>=3)return;nodes.push(makeNode(player.x,player.y));player.carry--;beep(600,.06,'square',.04)}function pulse(){if(player.dashCd>0)return;player.dash=10;player.dashCd=60;beep(220,.08,'triangle',.05);for(let n of nodes){if(Math.hypot(n.x-player.x,n.y-player.y)<180){n.armed=true;n.cool=0;n.life=1200;for(let i=0;i<8;i++)sparks.push({x:n.x,y:n.y,vx:rand(-2,2),vy:rand(-2,2),life:20,col:'#7ef9ff'})}}}function moveEntity(e){for(let w of walls){let nx=clamp(e.x,w.x-e.r,w.x+w.w+e.r),ny=clamp(e.y,w.y-e.r,w.y+w.h+e.r);let dx=e.x-nx,dy=e.y-ny;if(dx*dx+dy*dy<e.r*e.r){let d=Math.hypot(dx,dy)||1;let push=e.r-d;e.x+=dx/d*push;e.y+=dy/d*push}}e.x=clamp(e.x,70,890);e.y=clamp(e.y,70,890)}function los(a,b){for(let w of walls){if(lineRect(a.x,a.y,b.x,b.y,w))return false}return true}function lineRect(x1,y1,x2,y2,r){return lineLine(x1,y1,x2,y2,r.x,r.y,r.x+r.w,r.y)||lineLine(x1,y1,x2,y2,r.x,r.y,r.x,r.y+r.h)||lineLine(x1,y1,x2,y2,r.x+r.w,r.y,r.x+r.w,r.y+r.h)||lineLine(x1,y1,x2,y2,r.x,r.y+r.h,r.x+r.w,r.y+r.h)}function lineLine(x1,y1,x2,y2,x3,y3,x4,y4){const d=(x1-x2)*(y3-y4)-(y1-y2)*(x3-x4);if(!d)return false;const t=((x1-x3)*(y3-y4)-(y1-y3)*(x3-x4))/d;const u=-((x1-x2)*(y1-y3)-(y1-y2)*(x1-x3))/d;return t>=0&&t<=1&&u>=0&&u<=1}function update(){t++;const i=input();if((state==='title'||state==='gameover'||state==='victory')&&i.button1){if(!last){startGame()}last=i.button1?1:0;return}else last=i.button1?1:0;if(state==='stageclear'){if(i.button1Pressed||t>90){spawnStage(bossIndex);state='play';beep(400,.08,'square',.04)}return}if(state!=='play')return;stageTimer++;if(player.inv>0)player.inv--;if(player.dashCd>0)player.dashCd--;if(player.dash>0)player.dash--;let mx=(i.left?-1:0)+(i.right?1:0),my=(i.up?-1:0)+(i.down?1:0);let m=Math.hypot(mx,my)||1,spd=player.speed*(player.dash>0?2.6:1);player.x+=mx/m*spd;player.y+=my/m*spd;moveEntity(player);if(i.button1Pressed)placeNode();if(i.button2Pressed)pulse();for(let p of parts){p.spin+=.1;if(dist(player,p)<player.r+p.r+4){player.carry=clamp(player.carry+1,0,6);score+=20;beep(900,.05,'triangle',.03);p.dead=true;for(let i=0;i<6;i++)sparks.push({x:p.x,y:p.y,vx:rand(-2,2),vy:rand(-2,2),life:18,col:'#ffe066'})}}parts=parts.filter(p=>!p.dead);for(let n of nodes){n.life--;if(n.cool>0)n.cool--;if(n.life<=0)n.dead=true;for(let e of enemies){if(!n.armed||n.cool>0)continue;if(dist(n,e)<85&&los(n,e)){e.hp-=1;n.cool=18;beep(760,.04,'square',.025);for(let k=0;k<4;k++)sparks.push({x:e.x,y:e.y,vx:rand(-2,2),vy:rand(-2,2),life:12,col:'#7ef9ff'})}}}nodes=nodes.filter(n=>!n.dead);for(let e of enemies){let target=player,bait=null,bd=1e9;for(let n of nodes)if(n.armed){let d=dist(n,e);if(d<bd){bd=d;bait=n}}if(bait&&bd<260&&los(e,bait))target=bait;let dx=target.x-e.x,dy=target.y-e.y,d=Math.hypot(dx,dy)||1;e.x+=dx/d*e.v;e.y+=dy/d*e.v;moveEntity(e);if(e.type==='maw'){e.cool--;if(e.cool<=0){e.cool=90;for(let a=0;a<6;a++){let ang=Math.atan2(player.y-e.y,player.x-e.x)+a*Math.PI/3;bullets.push({x:e.x,y:e.y,vx:Math.cos(ang)*3.4,vy:Math.sin(ang)*3.4,r:10,life:180,col:'#ff8fab'})}beep(180,.12,'sawtooth',.04)}}if(e.type==='priest'){e.angle+=.08;e.cool--;if(e.cool<=0){e.cool=70;for(let a=0;a<2;a++){let ang=e.angle+a*Math.PI;bullets.push({x:e.x,y:e.y,vx:Math.cos(ang)*5,vy:Math.sin(ang)*5,r:12,life:130,col:'#ffa94d',saw:true})}beep(260,.09,'square',.04)}}if(e.type==='titan'){e.cool--;e.armor=(stageTimer%180<70)?1:0;if(e.cool<=0){e.cool=95;for(let a=0;a<8;a++){let ang=a*Math.PI/4+(stageTimer*.02);bullets.push({x:e.x,y:e.y,vx:Math.cos(ang)*2.7,vy:Math.sin(ang)*2.7,r:14,life:220,col:'#c77dff'})}for(let i2=0;i2<4;i2++){let px,py;do{px=rand(120,840);py=rand(120,840)}while(Math.hypot(px-player.x,py-player.y)<140);parts.push({x:px,y:py,r:10,spin:0})}beep(110,.15,'sawtooth',.05)}}if(target!==player&&dist(e,target)<e.r+target.r+8){target.dead=true;if(target!==player){beep(120,.08,'triangle',.04);for(let j=0;j<10;j++)sparks.push({x:target.x,y:target.y,vx:rand(-3,3),vy:rand(-3,3),life:16,col:'#7ef9ff'})}}if(dist(e,player)<e.r+player.r+6)hitPlayer(1);if(e.hp<=0||(e.type==='titan'&&e.hp<=0&&!e.armor)){} }nodes=nodes.filter(n=>!n.dead);for(let e of enemies){if(e.hp<=0&&!(e.type==='titan'&&e.armor)){explodeBoss(e);enemies=[];break}}for(let b of bullets){b.x+=b.vx;b.y+=b.vy;b.life--;if(b.saw)b.vx*=.998,b.vy*=.998;moveEntity(b);if(dist(b,player)<b.r+player.r){b.dead=true;hitPlayer(1)}if(b.life<=0)b.dead=true}bullets=bullets.filter(b=>!b.dead);for(let s of sparks){s.x+=s.vx;s.y+=s.vy;s.vx*=.96;s.vy*=.96;s.life--}sparks=sparks.filter(s=>s.life>0)}function drawGrid(){x.fillStyle='#0f141a';x.fillRect(0,0,W,H);x.strokeStyle='rgba(120,160,200,.08)';x.lineWidth=2;for(let i=60;i<W;i+=60){x.beginPath();x.moveTo(i,0);x.lineTo(i,H);x.stroke();x.beginPath();x.moveTo(0,i);x.lineTo(W,i);x.stroke()}}function drawWalls(){for(let w of walls){x.fillStyle='#242c36';x.fillRect(w.x,w.y,w.w,w.h);x.strokeStyle='#3d4a59';x.lineWidth=4;x.strokeRect(w.x,w.y,w.w,w.h)}}function txt(s,px,y,size=24,col='#e8f0ff',align='center'){x.fillStyle=col;x.font='bold '+size+'px system-ui,sans-serif';x.textAlign=align;x.fillText(s,px,y)}function draw(){drawGrid();drawWalls();if(state==='title'){x.fillStyle='#18212a';x.fillRect(90,110,780,740);x.strokeStyle='#4cc9f0';x.lineWidth=6;x.strokeRect(90,110,780,740);txt('SCRAP CIRCUIT',480,230,62,'#7ef9ff');txt('BOSS RUN',480,300,48,'#ffd166');txt('Build bait nodes. Arm them with a pulse.',480,420,28);txt('Bosses chase what they can sense.',480,462,28);txt('Drag them through your trap web.',480,504,28);txt('STICK MOVE',480,620,26,'#8ce99a');txt('BUTTON 1 PLACE NODE / START',480,660,26,'#8ce99a');txt('BUTTON 2 PULSE DASH',480,700,26,'#8ce99a');txt('PRESS BUTTON 1',480,790,34,t%40<20?'#ffffff':'#4cc9f0');return}if(state==='play'||state==='stageclear'){for(let p of parts){x.save();x.translate(p.x,p.y);x.rotate(p.spin);x.strokeStyle='#ffd166';x.lineWidth=4;x.strokeRect(-10,-10,20,20);x.beginPath();x.moveTo(-14,0);x.lineTo(14,0);x.moveTo(0,-14);x.lineTo(0,14);x.stroke();x.restore()}for(let n of nodes){x.strokeStyle=n.armed?'#7ef9ff':'#6c757d';x.lineWidth=5;x.beginPath();x.arc(n.x,n.y,n.r,0,7);x.stroke();x.beginPath();x.moveTo(n.x-10,n.y);x.lineTo(n.x+10,n.y);x.moveTo(n.x,n.y-10);x.lineTo(n.x,n.y+10);x.stroke();if(n.armed){x.strokeStyle='rgba(126,249,255,.18)';x.beginPath();x.arc(n.x,n.y,85,0,7);x.stroke()}}for(let b of bullets){x.fillStyle=b.col;x.beginPath();x.arc(b.x,b.y,b.r,0,7);x.fill()}for(let e of enemies){x.fillStyle=e.type==='maw'?'#ff6b6b':e.type==='priest'?'#ffa94d':'#c77dff';x.beginPath();x.arc(e.x,e.y,e.r,0,7);x.fill();if(e.type==='maw'){x.fillStyle='#111';x.beginPath();x.arc(e.x+10,e.y,12,0,7);x.fill()}if(e.type==='priest'){x.strokeStyle='#fff3';x.lineWidth=6;x.beginPath();x.arc(e.x,e.y,e.r+10,0,7);x.stroke()}if(e.type==='titan'&&e.armor){x.strokeStyle='#8ce99a';x.lineWidth=7;x.beginPath();x.arc(e.x,e.y,e.r+10,0,7);x.stroke()}x.fillStyle='#0008';x.fillRect(e.x-44,e.y-e.r-24,88,10);x.fillStyle='#ff5d73';x.fillRect(e.x-44,e.y-e.r-24,88*(e.hp/e.max),10)}for(let s of sparks){x.fillStyle=s.col;x.fillRect(s.x,s.y,4,4)}if(!(player.inv>0&&t%10<5)){x.fillStyle=player.dash>0?'#8ce99a':'#4cc9f0';x.beginPath();x.arc(player.x,player.y,player.r,0,7);x.fill();x.strokeStyle='#fff';x.lineWidth=3;x.beginPath();x.moveTo(player.x-8,player.y);x.lineTo(player.x+8,player.y);x.moveTo(player.x,player.y-8);x.lineTo(player.x,player.y+8);x.stroke()}x.fillStyle='#111a';x.fillRect(40,26,880,70);txt('HP '+player.hp+'   LIVES '+lives+'   SCRAP '+player.carry+'   SCORE '+score,60,70,28,'#e8f0ff','left');txt(bossName,900,70,28,'#ffd166','right');if(state==='stageclear'){x.fillStyle='rgba(0,0,0,.55)';x.fillRect(0,0,W,H);txt('BOSS SCRAPPED',480,430,56,'#8ce99a');txt('PRESS BUTTON 1',480,510,30,'#fff')}return}if(state==='gameover'||state==='victory'){x.fillStyle='rgba(0,0,0,.45)';x.fillRect(0,0,W,H);txt(state==='victory'?'CIRCUIT CLEARED':'WRECKED',480,360,70,state==='victory'?'#8ce99a':'#ff6b6b');txt('SCORE '+score,480,460,42,'#ffd166');txt('PRESS BUTTON 1',480,600,34,'#ffffff');}}function loop(ts){update();draw();requestAnimationFrame(loop)}requestAnimationFrame(loop);</script></body></html>
